page: Microsoft Azure FX12mds is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the FXMDVS family, virtualized via Microsoft Hyper-V. It features 12 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor. The hardware configuration includes 252.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high resource density of 21.0 GB of RAM per vCPU.

This server is equipped with 516 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-speed disk attachments. It does not include any integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The high memory-to-vCPU ratio represents a specific hardware tradeoff, prioritizing massive memory capacity over high parallel compute core counts.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the FX12mds offers high memory density relative to its compute footprint, making it a specialized option for workloads that require large in-memory datasets without needing massive parallel processing power. This configuration is designed for memory-intensive workloads, in-memory databases, caching layers, and enterprise database management systems.
description: Microsoft Azure FX12mds is an x86_64 architecture server within the FXMDVS family, virtualized using Microsoft Hyper-V. It features 12 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and is equipped with 252.0 GB of system memory, establishing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 21.0 GB per core. The server includes 516 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage, though it lacks integrated GPUs and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile trades off high parallel compute core counts for massive memory capacity, offering qualitative cost efficiency for memory-bound applications. The FX12mds is designed for memory-intensive workloads, including in-memory databases, large-scale caching layers, and enterprise database management systems.
og_description: Microsoft Azure FX12mds is an x86_64 memory-optimized server featuring 12 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 252.0 GB of RAM, and 516 GB of local storage, designed for memory-intensive enterprise database workloads.

tagline: A memory-intensive server featuring high RAM-to-vCPU density and local storage for demanding database and caching workloads.
